name: Torex Gold Resources Inc.
description: Torex Gold Resources Inc. is a Canadian gold producer operating the 100%-owned Morelos Complex in Guerrero, Mexico — currently the largest gold-producing operation in Mexico. The Morelos Complex encompasses the Media Luna and ELG underground mines feeding a centralized processing facility, with the EPO deposit in development. The company also holds the Los Reyes project in Sinaloa, Mexico, acquired through its 2025 purchase of Prime Mining Corp.
